rationale.root_cause: The response was empty and did not identify the memcpy misuse (sizeof(*structCharVoid)) that overwrites past charFirst or explain the heap-based overflow mechanism. No reference to the FLAW site was made.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed to copy only sizeof(structCharVoid->charFirst) bytes.
rationale.global_fix: No suggestion was made to use a bounded field copy helper or typed buffer wrapper to avoid confusing struct size with field size.
